an4.172:1.1:
1
There the Venerable Sāriputta addressed the bhikkhus: "Friends, bhikkhus!"
an4.172:2.1: "Friend!" those bhikkhus replied. The Venerable Sāriputta said this:
an4.172:2.2:
2
(1) "A half-month, friends, after my full ordination I realized the analytical knowledge of meaning by way of its divisions and formulation.
In many ways I explain it, teach it, proclaim it, establish it, disclose it, analyze it, and elucidate it.
anyone who is perplexed or uncertain
me with a question; I
with my answer.
Our teacher, who is highly skilled in our teachings, is present.
an4.172:2.3:
3
(2) "A half-month after my full ordination I realized the analytical knowledge of the Dhamma by way of its divisions and formulation. In many ways I explain it, teach it, proclaim it, establish it, disclose it, analyze it, and elucidate it.
anyone who is perplexed or uncertain
me with a question; I
with my answer. Our teacher, who is highly skilled in our teachings, is present.
an4.172:2.4:
4
(3) "A half-month after my full ordination I realized the analytical knowledge of language by way of its divisions and formulation. In many ways I explain it, teach it, proclaim it, establish it, disclose it, analyze it, and elucidate it.
anyone who is perplexed or uncertain
me with a question; I
with my answer. Our teacher, who is highly skilled in our teachings, is present.
an4.172:2.5:
5
(4) "A half-month after my full ordination I realized the analytical knowledge of discernment by way of its divisions and formulation. In many ways I explain it, teach it, proclaim it, establish it, disclose it, analyze it, and elucidate it.
anyone who is perplexed or uncertain
me with a question; I
with my answer. Our teacher, who is highly skilled in our teachings, is present."
